prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-PFSWKC-2PC-4-ORNG Product Type: FUNNEL Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: 2pc ASR Outdoor Funnel Key Chain Set Camping Backpacking Tool Description: Never make a mess again while pouring liquids with the 2pc ASR Outdoor Funnel Set.

This set comes with 1 larger funnel (4" x 2/75") and a smaller funnel (3.25" x 2"). They are constructed of super durable lightweight polypropelene, and each comes with a detachable ball chain. The mini handle has a hole for the chain, making these perfect for attaching to bags, purses, belts or backpacks.

Make sure to snag this set of funnels before your next camping trip, tailgate party or sporting event. Search Terms: camping funnel outdoor liquids keychains keychain Features: - Material: Durable, Lightweight Polypropelene - Mini Handle w/ Hole for Key Chain | Detachable Ball Chain - Larger Funnel Dimensions: 4" x 2.75" (Top Diameter) - Smaller Funnel Dimensions: 3.25: x 2" - Bright Orange Color === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 2pc Orange Funnel Keychain Set

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 2-pk Orange Funnel Key Chain Set

anthropic.title_differentiation: 2 Sizes, Durable Polypropylene, Detachable Ball Chain, Camping, Outdoor Liquids

openai.title_differentiation: Large And Small Funnels, Lightweight Polypropylene, Detachable Ball Chain, Backpack And Keychain Ready, Bright Orange
